model-viewer.min.js — <model-viewer> web component, v4.1.0
Source: https://github.com/google/model-viewer (npm @google/model-viewer)
License: Apache-2.0 (model-viewer itself — its Google LLC Apache-2.0 license
headers are preserved as full text blocks inside the minified file). The bundle
also vendors two dependencies, whose headers survive as SPDX identifiers:
  three.js — Copyright 2010-2025 Three.js Authors, MIT (SPDX: MIT)
  lit      — Copyright Google LLC, BSD-3-Clause (SPDX: BSD-3-Clause)
Third-party attributions for the landing page must carry all three notices.

Vendored (not CDN-loaded) so the landing page stays self-contained. To upgrade:
curl -o model-viewer.min.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@google/model-viewer@<ver>/dist/model-viewer.min.js
and update the version in this note.
